offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, the complexity of OSHA compliance reporting causes potential fines and project delays. We automate report preparation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in preparing timely OSHA compliance reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and user-friendly interface for data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
